en.text:
I’m a {{web developer}} specialized in [[Ruby on Rails]] and [[Next.js]]. I enjoy building scalable and maintainable web applications with clean architecture.

I’m also passionate about UI/UX design and creating intuitive user experiences. Currently, I’m continuously improving my skills in both backend engineering and modern frontend development.

I look forward to collaborating [[with you!]]

es.text:
Soy un {{desarrollador web}} especializado en [[Ruby on Rails]] y [[Next.js]]. Disfruto construyendo aplicaciones web escalables y mantenibles con arquitectura limpia.

También me apasiona el diseño UI/UX y la creación de experiencias de usuario intuitivas. Actualmente, sigo mejorando mis habilidades en ingeniería backend y desarrollo frontend moderno.

¡Espero con interés colaborar [[contigo!]]

fr.text:
Je suis un {{développeur web}} spécialisé en [[Ruby on Rails]] et [[Next.js]]. J’aime créer des applications web évolutives et maintenables avec une architecture propre.

Je suis également passionné par le design UI/UX et la création d’expériences utilisateur intuitives. Actuellement, je continue à améliorer mes compétences en ingénierie backend et en développement frontend moderne.

Je suis impatient de collaborer [[avec vous !]]

ko.text:
저는 [[Ruby on Rails]]와 [[Next.js]]를 전문으로 하는 {{웹 개발자}}입니다. 깔끔한 아키텍처로 확장 가능하고 유지보수 가능한 웹 애플리케이션 구축을 즐깁니다.

UI/UX 디자인과 직관적인 사용자 경험 만들기에도 열정을 가지고 있습니다. 현재 백엔드 엔지니어링과 최신 프론트엔드 개발 역량을 지속적으로 향상시키고 있습니다.

[[당신과 협업]]하기를 기대하고 있습니다!

en.title: CEO at [[SalesForce]]
en.text: Working with Thang was a truly [[transformative experience]]. His outstanding programming skills and collaborative spirit not only elevated the quality of our project but also brought a renewed sense of motivation and purpose to us.

es.title: CEO en [[SalesForce]]
es.text: Trabajar con Thang fue una [[experiencia transformadora]]. Su gran habilidad para programar y su espíritu colaborativo mejoraron el proyecto y nos devolvieron la motivación y el propósito.

fr.title: PDG de [[SalesForce]]
fr.text: Travailler avec Thang fut une [[expérience transformante]]. Ses compétences en programmation et son esprit d’équipe ont élevé le projet et ravivé notre motivation et notre but.

ko.title: 세일즈포스 CEO
ko.text: Mark와 함께한 시간은 [[변화의 경험]]이었습니다. 그의 뛰어난 프로그래밍 실력과 협업 정신은 프로젝트 품질을 높이고 우리에게 새로운 동기를 불어넣었습니다.

en.title: Lead Developer at [[GitHub]]
en.text: Having Thang on our team was an invaluable asset. His [[deep programming insights and mentorship]] not only elevated our projects but also empowered us to tackle every challenge with confidence and creativity.

es.title: Desarrollador Principal en [[GitHub]]
es.text: Tener a Mark fue un recurso invaluable. Sus [[profundos conocimientos y mentoría]] mejoraron nuestros proyectos y nos dieron confianza para afrontar cualquier desafío con creatividad.

fr.title: Développeur Principal chez [[GitHub]]
fr.text: La présence de Mark fut un atout inestimable. Ses [[connaissances en programmation et son mentorat]] ont renforcé nos projets et notre capacité à relever les défis avec assurance.

ko.title: [[GitHub]] 수석 개발자
ko.text: Mark는 소중한 자산이었습니다. 그의 [[깊은 프로그래밍 통찰력과 멘토링]]은 프로젝트를 향상시키고 도전을 자신감과 창의성으로 해결할 수 있게 해주었습니다.

en.title: Managing Director at [[Dingga]]
en.text: Collaborating with Mark was a true [[game changer]] for our entire development process. His [[deep technical expertise]], creative problem-solving, and proactive mindset were absolutely invaluable.

es.title: Directora General en [[Dingga]]
es.text: Colaborar con Mark fue un verdadero [[punto de inflexión]]. Su [[gran experiencia técnica]], creatividad y mentalidad proactiva fueron absolutamente invaluables para nuestro equipo.

fr.title: Directrice Générale chez [[Dingga]]
fr.text: Travailler avec Mark a été un vrai [[tournant]]. Son [[expertise technique approfondie]], sa créativité et sa proactivité ont été d’une valeur inestimable pour notre développement.

ko.title: 딩가 전무이사
ko.text: Mark와의 협업은 진정한 [[게임 체인저]]였습니다. 그의 [[깊이 있는 기술 전문성]], 창의적인 문제 해결력, 능동적인 태도는 매우 소중한 자산이었습니다.

en.title: Creative Director at [[Dribbble]]
en.text: Thang's [[attention to detail]] and his [[innovative thinking]] brought a fresh perspective to our whole design process! Simply amazing!

es.title: Director Creativo en [[Dribbble]]
es.text: La [[atención al detalle]] y el [[pensamiento innovador]] de Thang aportaron una perspectiva fresca a todo nuestro proceso de diseño. ¡Simplemente increíble!

fr.title: Directeur Créatif chez [[Dribbble]]
fr.text: L’[[attention aux détails]] et la [[pensée innovante]] de Thang ont apporté une perspective nouvelle à tout notre processus de design ! Simplement incroyable !

ko.title: [[Dribbble]] 크리에이티브 디렉터
ko.text: 탕의 [[세심한 배려]]와 [[혁신적인 사고]]가 전체 디자인 과정에 신선한 시각을 가져왔습니다! 정말 놀랍습니다!
